warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
Warm Up
10 Scap Push Ups
10 scap Pull ups
10 x Inch Worms
10 I-Y-T-W
Wrist Mobilisation

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
3 Rounds for Time
2 mins On - 1 Min off
40 Double Unders
Max T2B in time remaining

gymnastics:
Double Under Progression
Even Min Singles - focus on jumping higher
Odd Mins Penguin Clap Drill
Double Under attempts -
Double - single - single - single - Double
for the DU Experts - go for max sets every 2-3 mins
T2B Bar Progression
1-2 mins False Grip on bar - focus on Knuckles Up
EMOM x 3
10 x Beat Swing
EMOM x 3
Jump Into Hollow/Arch x 10
EMOM x 3
Bigger Beat Swing - Push Down on Bar
- Put Ball between feet - Reach Long in the Arch - Dont bend the knees
EMOM x 3
Knees to Chest - Aggressive & Pop - pause
EMOM x 6
Beat Swing with Straight legs - to target
Aim for height without losing tension.

hypertrophy.reasoning: Today hammers shoulders, hip flexors via T2B, and grip. Build opposing muscle groups without CNS fatigue.

siri_text: Thursday's workout. Gymnastics: Double Under Progression. Metcon: Rounds for Time: 40 Double Unders. For hypertrophy, focus on chest, back thickness, hamstrings.
